analysis.name: Epic Chain
analysis.summary: EPIC 24小时涨幅29%，市值约1620万美元，全流通。项目定位旅游RWA，获Ripple等投资，但新闻多为旧闻，近期无重大催化。成交量异常放大但价格波动大，需警惕短期炒作风险。

recommendation.invalidation: 若24小时内成交量回落或价格跌破0.45美元，则短期上涨逻辑失效。

catalysts: Ripple等知名机构背书，可能吸引市场关注
旅游RWA概念，市场想象空间大
24小时成交量激增，短期资金推动

latestNews.title: Epic Chain (EPIC) Soars as Ripple-Backed Token Bets on $50T RWA Market - DailyCoin
latestNews.reason: 强调Ripple支持和RWA市场潜力，但也是旧闻（2025年8月）

fundamentals: 项目方有Ripple、Algorand等知名机构投资
商业模式：提供酒店和机票折扣，返现XRP
覆盖200万+酒店，支持多种加密货币支付
marketRead: 24小时涨幅29%，但7日跌幅8%，14日跌幅25.5%，波动剧烈
成交量3234万美元，是市值的2倍，换手率极高，可能存在短期炒作
Binance数据受限，无法获取具体K线，但CoinGecko显示价格0.485美元，ATH 3.2美元，跌幅85%
risks: 新闻均为旧闻，缺乏近期催化，上涨持续性存疑
成交量异常放大可能是短期资金博弈，风险较高
项目知名度低，市值小，流动性风险
旅游RWA赛道竞争激烈，落地效果待验证
watchlist: 关注是否有新合作或产品上线公告
观察成交量是否持续放大
监控价格是否站稳0.5美元以上
sourceNotes: Binance数据因地区限制无法获取，价格和成交量来自CoinGecko
新闻多为2025年，时效性不足
项目基本面信息来自CoinGecko简介

profile.name: Epic Chain
profile.description: Epic is the travel layer for crypto, giving crypto holders access to hotels and flights at up to 30% discount vs Booking.com. Inventory is sourced directly from over 100 wholesale travel suppliers, providing access to pricing that has historically been unavailable to retail consumers. The platform covers 2M+ hotels worldwide including Marriott, Aman, and Hilton properties, alongside flights across 180 countries. Every booking earns up to 8% cashback paid in XRP. All major cryptocurrencies are accepted alongside traditional payment methods including Visa, Mastercard, and Apple Pay. EPIC holders with $10,000 or more access Epic Concierge, a dedicated travel service providing end-to-end trip planning and further discounted rates, at no additional cost. Epic was founded as Ethernity, having advised the United States Space Force, Lionel Messi, Shaquille O'Neal, and Toys R Us on digital asset distribution at scale. The company has raised more than $20 million and is backed by Ripple, Algorand, Polygon, Chainlink, CEFFU, and BRINKS.
